title: Electronic device with fingerprint sensor
abstract: An electronic device having a display panel, a touch panel, and a fingerprint sensor panel. The touch panel is disposed on the display panel. The fingerprint sensor panel is disposed on the touch panel. The touch panel has a touch sensor. The fingerprint sensor panel has a fingerprint sensor.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1 . An electronic device comprising: a display panel; a touch panel disposed on the display panel, the touch panel comprising a touch sensor; and a fingerprint sensor panel disposed on the touch panel, the fingerprint sensor panel comprising a fingerprint sensor. 2. The electronic device of claim 1 , wherein the touch panel comprises an adhesive coupling the touch sensor to the display panel. 3. The electronic device of claim 1 , wherein the fingerprint sensor panel comprises a cover, the fingerprint sensor, and an adhesive coupling the fingerprint sensor to the touch panel. 4. The electronic device of claims 1 to 3, wherein the fingerprint sensor is disposed over at least a majority of a top surface of the touch panel. 5. The electronic device of claims 1 to 3, wherein the electronic device is a smartphone, a tablet, a laptop computer, or an all-in-one computer. 6. The electronic device of claims 1 to 3, comprising a body holding the display panel, the touch panel, and the fingerprint sensor panel. 7. The electronic device of claim 1 , comprising a circuit board comprising a fingerprint-sensor integrated circuit coupled to the fingerprint sensor. 8. The electronic device of claim 7, wherein the circuit board comprises a touch-panel integrated circuit coupled to the touch sensor. 9. A method of manufacturing an electronic device, comprising: 

 disposing a touch panel on a display panel, the touch panel comprising a touch sensor and a first adhesive coupling the touch sensor to the display panel; and disposing a fingerprint sensor panel on the touch panel, the fingerprint sensor panel comprising a fingerprint sensor and a second adhesive coupling the fingerprint sensor to the touch panel. 10. The method of claim 9, wherein the touch panel comprises a glass cover. 1 1 . The method of claim 9 or 10, wherein the fingerprint sensor panel comprises a transparent cover. 12. The method of claim 9 or 10, wherein disposing the fingerprint sensor panel on the touch panel comprises disposing the fingerprint sensor over at least a majority of a top surface of the touch panel. 13. The method of claim 9 or 10, wherein the electronic device is a smartphone. 14. The method of claim 9, comprising coupling a circuit board to the fingerprint sensor, wherein the circuit board comprises a fingerprint-sensor integrated circuit. 15. The method of claim 14, comprising coupling the circuit board to the touch sensor, wherein the circuit board comprises a touch-sensor integrated circuit. 16. An electronic device comprising: a touch display comprising: a display panel; and a touch panel disposed on the display panel, wherein the touch panel comprises a touch sensor and a first adhesive coupling the touch sensor to the display panel; and 

 a fingerprint sensor panel disposed on the touch panel, the fingerprint sensor panel comprising a fingerprint sensor and a second adhesive coupling the fingerprint sensor to the touch panel. 17. The electronic device of claim 16, wherein the touch panel comprises a glass cover. 18. The electronic device of claim 16, wherein the fingerprint sensor panel comprises a transparent cover. 19. The electronic device of claims 16 to 18, wherein the fingerprint sensor covers at least a majority of a top surface of the touch panel. 20. The electronic device of claim 16, comprising a circuit board comprising a finger-sensor integrated circuit coupled to the fingerprint sensor. 21 . The electronic device of claim 19, wherein the circuit board comprises a touch-panel integrated circuit coupled to the touch sensor. 22. An electronic device comprising: a display panel; a touch panel disposed on the display panel, the touch panel comprising a touch sensor; and a fingerprint sensor panel disposed on the touch panel, the fingerprint sensor panel comprising a fingerprint sensor and a cover. 23. The electronic device of claim 22, wherein the touch panel comprises a glass cover, the touch sensor, and an adhesive coupling the touch sensor to the display panel. 24. The electronic device of claim 22, wherein the fingerprint sensor panel comprises an adhesive coupling the fingerprint sensor to a glass cover of the touch panel. 25. The electronic device of claim 22, wherein the fingerprint sensor panel comprises an adhesive coupling the fingerprint sensor to the touch sensor of the touch panel.
